name: catetus
description: SOTA 3D Gaussian Splatting compression — encode, score, analyze, and benchmark splat scenes from inside Claude Desktop.
long_description:
Catetus is the state-of-the-art toolkit for compressing and benchmarking 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) scenes. This MCP server exposes 15 tools across two tiers:

**Free (always on, no key):** analyze a .ply / .spz / .gltf / .glb file, list and inspect SplatBench corpus scenes, list competitor codecs (PlayCanvas SOG, Inria 3DGS, SPZ, glTF KHR_gaussian_splatting), run free encoder presets locally, render before/after diffs, validate pipeline output.

**Paid (set CATETUS_API_KEY):** hosted encode on Modal A100s with the SOG / SOG+V5tail / T2.1.R / V5.2 targets, ML-scored perceptual fidelity, differentiable repack, preset recommendation against scene constraints, predicted quality without encoding, and batch jobs across many scenes.

Resources: the canonical-11 leaderboard, SplatBench v0 corpus, 3-tier comparison, preset cheatsheet, competitor codec catalog, and SDK license.

Prompts: 'compress for product page', 'compare against SOG', 'pick best preset', 'audit existing outputs'.

Headline numbers: V5.2 beats SuperSplat SOG by +15.56 dB avg PSNR across all 11 canonical scenes at 1.02× SOG bytes (11/11 wins).

api_key.title: Catetus API Key
api_key.description: Optional. Unlocks the paid tools: encode, repack, score_fidelity, predict_quality, recommend_preset, batch_jobs, list_jobs. Get one at https://catetus.com/dashboard. Leave blank to use the free tier only.

api_base.title: API base URL
api_base.description: Override for the api.catetus.com base URL (advanced — leave default unless instructed by support).

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: One of: debug, info, warn, error. Defaults to info. Logs go to stderr — never stdout (would corrupt MCP).

allowlist_roots.title: Filesystem allowlist root
allowlist_roots.description: Directory the MCP server is allowed to read .ply / .spz / .gltf / .glb files from. The `analyze`, `compare`, and `validate_pipeline` tools refuse paths outside this root. Defaults to your home directory.

tools.name: analyze
tools.description: Analyze a .ply/.spz/.gltf/.glb scene: splat count, bbox, SH degree, opacity histogram, content hash, recommendations. (free)

tools.name: list_presets
tools.description: List encoder presets (free + paid) with target use case, typical compression ratio, and tier. (free)

tools.name: list_scenes
tools.description: List SplatBench corpus scenes with class, license, splat count, and headline metrics. (free)

tools.name: get_scene
tools.description: Get the full per-scene record + the 3-tier (SF / T2.1.R / V5.2) vs SOG leaderboard row. (free)

tools.name: optimize
tools.description: Run a free Catetus preset over a splat file locally and return the output. (free, stdio-only)

tools.name: compare
tools.description: Render before/after frames and return per-frame ΔE94, SSIM-loss, pixel-match. (free, stdio-only)

tools.name: list_competitor_codecs
tools.description: List public competitor codecs (PlayCanvas SOG, Inria 3DGS, SPZ, glTF KHR_gaussian_splatting…) with Catetus comparison. (free)

tools.name: validate_pipeline
tools.description: Sanity-check a Catetus output: NaN/Inf check, container validity, expected splat count. (free)

tools.name: encode
tools.description: Hosted encode on Modal-backed workers using sog / sog+v5tail / v52 / t21r / sf-baseline targets. (paid)

tools.name: score_fidelity
tools.description: ML-score a render pair (V0.4 perceptual model) and return 22 input features. (paid)

tools.name: repack
tools.description: Differentiable repack on A100 — push an encoded asset toward a byte budget while preserving PSNR. (paid)

tools.name: predict_quality
tools.description: Predict mean ΔE94, p95 ΔE94, ML score of a preset on a scene WITHOUT running the encode. (paid)

tools.name: recommend_preset
tools.description: Given a scene + constraints, recommend the best preset and a next-best alternative. (paid)

tools.name: batch_jobs
tools.description: Submit a batch of encode/repack jobs and either poll asynchronously or wait inline. (paid)

tools.name: list_jobs
tools.description: List recent encode/repack jobs for the current API key. (paid)

prompts.name: compress_for_product_page
prompts.text: Compress a list of .ply scenes for a product page at a target byte budget per scene.

prompts.name: compare_against_sog
prompts.text: Encode a scene with both Catetus V5.2 and PlayCanvas SOG, then compare and ML-score for a head-to-head report.

prompts.name: pick_best_preset
prompts.text: Run analyze and recommend_preset against constraints described in plain English.

prompts.name: audit_existing_outputs
prompts.text: Run validate_pipeline on every .gltf/.spz in a directory and summarize pass/fail.
